'use client'; import { useEffect, useState } from 'react'; import { createClient } from '@/lib/supabase/client'; import { Users, GraduationCap, Search, Filter, MoreVertical, Mail, BookOpen, Target, TrendingUp, Award, AlertCircle, CheckCircle2, ChevronRight, ArrowUpRight, LayoutGrid, List, Database, Activity } from 'lucide-react'; import { motion, AnimatePresence } from 'framer-motion'; interface Student { student_id: string; name: string; email: string; college: string; branch: string; academic_year: string; student_skill?: any[]; } export default function AdminStudentsPage() { const supabase = createClient(); const [students, setStudents] = useState([]); const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true); const [search, setSearch] = useState(''); const [viewMode, setViewMode] = useState<'grid' | 'list'>('grid'); useEffect(() => { async function fetchStudents() { const { data } = await supabase .from('student') .select('*, student_skill(skill_id)'); setStudents(data || []); setLoading(false); } fetchStudents(); }, [supabase]); const filtered = students.filter(s => s.name?.toLowerCase().includes(search.toLowerCase()) || s.college?.toLowerCase().includes(search.toLowerCase()) || s.branch?.toLowerCase().includes(search.toLowerCase()) ); if (loading) return (

Accessing Student Registry...

); return (
{/* Header */}

Human Capital Management

Student Directory

setSearch(e.target.value)} className="w-full h-14 pl-12 pr-6 rounded-2xl border border-slate-100 bg-white text-[10px] font-black uppercase tracking-[3px] focus:border-amber-500/30 transition-all shadow-sm" />
{/* KPI Row */}
{[ { label: 'Verified Students', value: students.length, icon: CheckCircle2, color: 'text-amber-600', bg: 'bg-amber-50' }, { label: 'Placement Ready', value: students.filter(s => (s.student_skill?.length ?? 0) > 4).length, icon: Award, color: 'text-emerald-600', bg: 'bg-emerald-50' }, { label: 'Active Seekers', value: Math.round(students.length * 0.85), icon: Activity, color: 'text-indigo-600', bg: 'bg-indigo-50' }, { label: 'At Risk', value: students.filter(s => (s.student_skill?.length ?? 0) < 2).length, icon: AlertCircle, color: 'text-rose-600', bg: 'bg-rose-50' }, ].map(stat => (
{stat.label}
{stat.value}
))}
{filtered.length === 0 ? (

No Results Found

Try adjusting your search parameters.

) : viewMode === 'grid' ? (
{filtered.map((s, idx) => (
{s.name?.charAt(0) || 'S'}
Batch ID #{s.student_id.slice(0, 8)}

{s.name}

{s.email}
Branch Focus
{s.branch || 'N/A'}
Academic Year
{s.academic_year || 'N/A'} Year
Skill Strength {(s.student_skill?.length ?? 0) * 20}%
{s.college || 'Career Institute'}
))}
) : (
{filtered.map((s) => ( ))}
Student Academic Details Skills Portfolio Status Actions
{s.name?.charAt(0) || 'S'}
{s.name}
{s.email}
{s.branch}
{s.college}
{(s.student_skill?.length ?? 0)} Skills
4 ? 'bg-emerald-50 text-emerald-600 border-emerald-100' : 'bg-amber-50 text-amber-600 border-amber-100' }`}> {(s.student_skill?.length ?? 0) > 4 ? 'Elite Ready' : 'Active'}
)}
); }

'use client'; import { motion } from "framer-motion"; import { Zap, ShieldCheck, BarChart3, Globe, Cpu, Users, ArrowRight, CheckCircle2, Terminal, Activity, ChevronRight, Database } from "lucide-react"; import Link from "next/link"; import Navbar from "@/components/layout/Navbar"; import Footer from "@/components/layout/Footer"; import AnimatedSection from "@/components/ui/AnimatedSection"; import PremiumCard from "@/components/ui/PremiumCard"; export default function LandingPage() { const features = [ { title: "Skill Matching", description: "Advanced matching algorithms that align professional skillsets with organizational needs.", icon: , subtitle: "SERVICE_01" }, { title: "Career Placement", description: "Strategic internship and job placement pipelines for high-performance candidates.", icon: , subtitle: "SERVICE_02" }, { title: "Data Analytics", description: "Real-time analytics and predictive performance tracking for long-term project success.", icon: , subtitle: "SERVICE_03" }, { title: "Global Network", description: "Connect seamlessly across international hubs for borderless professional growth.", icon: , subtitle: "SERVICE_04" } ]; const steps = [ { number: "01", title: "Profile Setup", description: "Initialize your professional profile and verify your core competencies.", status: "COMPLETED" }, { number: "02", title: "AI Matching", description: "AI-driven algorithms identify high-probability internship opportunities in our network.", status: "ACTIVE" }, { number: "03", title: "Career Launch", description: "Seamless integration with top organizations for immediate professional impact.", status: "PENDING" } ]; const stats = [ { label: "Active Users", value: "854", icon: }, { label: "Skill Matches", value: "12,450", icon: }, { label: "Placements", value: "480", icon: }, { label: "Success Rate", value: "99.9%", icon: }, ]; return (
{/* --- HERO SECTION --- */}
{/* Tactical Background Elements */}
Platform Status: ONLINE

Professional
Skill Exchange

The premium platform for ambitious professionals and high-impact organizations. Accelerate your growth through intelligent skill matching.

Get Started
{/* --- STATS BAR --- */}
{stats.map((stat, idx) => (
{stat.icon} {stat.label}
{stat.value} ))}
{/* --- FEATURES SECTION --- */}

Professional Intelligence

Elevate Your Career

{features.map((feature, idx) => ( {feature.description} ))}
{/* --- OPERATIONS / WORKFLOW --- */}

Success Workflow

The Placement
Journey

Our systematic approach ensures timely placement and integration. Follow these steps to initialize your professional journey.

{steps.map((step, idx) => (
{step.number}

{step.title}

{step.description}

))}

messages.message:
Error: Calling setState synchronously within an effect can trigger cascading renders

Effects are intended to synchronize state between React and external systems such as manually updating the DOM, state management libraries, or other platform APIs. In general, the body of an effect should do one or both of the following:
* Update external systems with the latest state from React.
* Subscribe for updates from some external system, calling setState in a callback function when external state changes.

Calling setState synchronously within an effect body causes cascading renders that can hurt performance, and is not recommended. (https://react.dev/learn/you-might-not-need-an-effect).

> 12 |   useEffect(() => setMounted(true), []);
